generated_oml:
instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin for the building infrastructure"
]

instance BuildingTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors monitoring temperature in Building Control Systems (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance AirFlowSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors monitoring air flow in Building Control Systems (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirFlowDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors monitoring carbon dioxide levels in Building Control Systems (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators controlling HVAC systems in Building Control Systems (BCS)"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers for lighting systems in Building Control Systems (BCS)"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling for device modeling of Building Control Systems (BCS) components including sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance DTModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured Digital Twin artifacts generated from BIM models via Model-Driven Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTemperatureSensor
]

instance AirFlowDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirFlowSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streams for building monitoring and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler, PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance AirFlowData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air flow data streams for building monitoring and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirFlowDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler, PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 levels data streams for building monitoring and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataEnabler, PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process transforming enriched BIM models into structured DT artifacts for automated deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeDataEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing real-time sensor data streams for infrastructure monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predictive analytics using DT model and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for seamless integration of custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualization, InfrastructureOperationAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides FailurePredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACSettings
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for Facility Managers to monitor system states"
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for potential infrastructure failures"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization insights for energy efficiency in building operations"
]

instance AdjustHVACSettings : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC settings based on optimization analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InfrastructureOperationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual operation of physical infrastructure via interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Buildings and infrastructure assets in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, characterized by complex and heterogeneous environments requiring integration of static models with runtime data for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the entire lifecycle from design to operation."
    base:contains DigitalTwin
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a model-driven framework with a layered system architecture where the DT Framework acts as a central hub for coordination between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises three primary stages: (1) Initial device modeling within BIM environment where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish a unified semantic foundation; (2) Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation of enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention; and (3) Runtime operation featuring real-time data exchange for synchronization between physical and digital twins, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and integration of custom services via modular architecture. Governance is role-based, with Building Control Engineers handling modeling, Facility Managers operating the system, and DT Engineers extending functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to evaluate the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart for validity verification. Semantic drift, defined as the divergence of digital model alignment from physical counterparts over time, is a key uncertainty source requiring ongoing monitoring and correction."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and ensures interoperability across heterogeneous systems through standardized protocols."
]
